description_long: This is a square decorative cushion with a black fabric base and an intricate beige floral embroidery on the front. The cushion is bordered by a delicate, scalloped lace trim in a matching beige color, adding a touch of elegance and texture. The embroidery features a stylized flower with leaves and stems, giving the cushion a sophisticated, handcrafted appearance. The back of the cushion is plain black, without any visible patterns or embellishments. The cushion appears to be moderately plump, suggesting a soft, air-filled or fiber-filled interior. Its overall design and materials indicate it is intended for decorative use in upscale or stylish urban environments.
description: A square black cushion with beige floral embroidery and a scalloped lace trim, featuring a soft, plush appearance and elegant detailing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full floral embroidery and lace trim detail.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the cushion's thickness and the raised embroidery pattern.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain black fabric and the lace trim around the edge.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the cushion's plumpness and the dimensionality of the embroidery.
attribute_location: decorative bench or lounge chair in a city park or upscale urban plaza
attribute_placement: placed atop a bench or lounge seat, often arranged with other decorative cushions
